calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-20-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing/Court Trial this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Debra Lew, Esq. for Plaintiff: State Bar of California a Public Corp.
Plaintiff's witness: Tracy McCormick, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Jeffrey Allan Matz.
Exh. 1 - Application for Reimbursment dtd. 7-17-2000-------ID/EVID.
Exh. 2 - Final Decision #00-F-12870 dtd. 07-14-03----------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Jeffrey Allan Matz in Principal amount of $50,000.00, Interest at the rate of 7% and Costs and Fees per memo of cost.
Counsel to calculate the amount of interest and submit a Proposed Judgment to this Dept.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.

Dec. 29, 2004

Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

Mtn To Stay Proceedings; Declaration Of Jeffrey A. Matz In Supp Thereof
Off Calendar Oct-29-2004 Off Calendar
